layouts.hero: min-h-[80vh] flex flex-col items-start justify-center text-left px-4 md:px-8

button.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md font-medium text-white bg-[#D90429] hover:bg-[#EF233C] transition-colors shadow-sm active:scale-[0.98] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D90429]/50 focus:outline-none
button.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md font-medium text-slate-700 bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors active:scale-[0.98] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-200 focus:outline-none
button.ghost: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-200 focus:outline-none

card.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden

upload_zone.base: relative w-full border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded-2xl p-12 lg:p-24 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-slate-50/50 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors group cursor-pointer
upload_zone.branding_text_1: font-serif text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900

accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have clear focus rings.
accessibility.contrast: Text over backgrounds must meet WCAG AA standards. Use text-shadow if placed over an image.

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPORT GOOGLE FONTS: Add the provided Google Fonts link to the public/index.html <head> so 'IBM Plex Sans', 'Inter', and 'Playfair Display' load correctly.
CUSTOMIZE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom font families: sans: ['Inter', 'sans-serif'], serif: ['Playfair Display', 'serif'], heading: ['IBM Plex Sans', 'sans-serif'].

COMPLETELY REMOVE all existing purple/indigo color classes from the app. Use the defined high-contrast Swiss professional theme: Slate backgrounds, crisp white cards, and the brand RED (#D90429) for primary actions.
LOGO: The logo is already at /logo.png. Use it in the header and anywhere a brand mark is needed. Ensure the brand color ties perfectly with this red.

UPLOAD ZONE BRANDING: In the file upload area, you MUST use the serif font (`font-serif`) for the exact text 'DATA FORGE' and 'YOUR DATA, PERFECTED.'. Make 'DATA FORGE' large and bold, and 'YOUR DATA, PERFECTED.' slightly smaller and italicized.
LAYOUT & BENTO GRID: Implement a clean, structural BENTO GRID for the dashboard instead of generic centered layouts.
HEADER: Apply 'Glassmorphism' (`bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200`) to the sticky header. Ensure it does NOT use a complete transparent background.

HERO SECTION: For the Landing Page hero, create a massive, high-contrast typography section. 'DATA FORGE' should be huge. Do not center everything generically—use a strong 12-column grid layout where the text spans 8 columns.
ANIMATIONS: Add hover animations to all buttons and cards. Cards should lift slightly (`-translate-y-1`) with a deeper shadow (`shadow-md`).
ICONS: Use Lucide React for clean, professional iconography. Avoid emojis completely.

DATA VISUALIZATION: Make sure the data quality score and charts use professional colors (e.g., Slate, Emerald for good, Amber for warnings, Red for errors). Use `recharts` for the interactive charts, styled to match the clean aesthetic.
TESTING: Add `data-testid` to all interactive and key informational elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic.
Do not use dark colors as gradients.
Do not make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use generous spacing (2-3x more than feels comfortable).
Use subtle grain textures or noise overlays where appropriate.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
